# Box

A fundamental layout primitive that renders a `div` element by default. It provides access to all Chakra UI style props.

## Import

```jsx
import { Box } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| as | `React.ElementType` | `div` | The HTML element or component to render |
| children | `ReactNode` | - | Content to render inside the box |
| ...styleProps | - | - | All Chakra UI style props (padding, margin, bg, color, etc.) |

## Usage

```jsx
<Box p={4} bg="gray.100" borderRadius="md">
  Hello World
</Box>
```

## Features

- Renders a `div` by default, customizable via `as` prop
- Supports all CSS properties via style props
- Responsive style values supported
- Composable with all other Chakra components
